Before then, the World Cup was an enormously popular event with surprisingly limited commercial significance; the 1990 tournament in Italy, for instance, lost money for broadcasters. summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Christian Keller, Barclays Head of Economics Research; John Kerry, Former US Secretary of State; Nils Schmid, German Deputy Defense Minister; Theo Baker, Author of 'How to Rule the World'  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Soars After AI-Fueled Forecast Shatters Estimates | The Opening Trade 6/25/2026
title_cn: 人工智能推动的预测打破预期后，美光股价飙升开盘交易 2026 年 6 月 25 日
summary:
Micron, the largest US maker of computer memory chips, surged in premarket trading after its quarterly sales forecast crushed Wall Street estimates, signaling that an AI-fueled growth run remains strong. Micron posted the results at a delicate moment for the AI industry. Shares of chipmakers and other technology companies had been hammered in recent days on fears that a spending boom was faltering.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-China Exec of Advertising Giant Sentenced to Life in $176 Million Bribery Case

title: Stretched Tech Valuations Raise Questions on Capex, BofA Says

"Who is going to pay for this capital expenditure that is basically fueling the Micron demand," Raedler asks during an interview on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Earnings Inflate the AI Bubble: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 美光财报吹大人工智能泡沫：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Demand Roils Aumovio’s Talks to Buy Chips, CFO Says
title_cn: 首席财务官表示，人工智能需求扰乱了 Aumovio 购买芯片的谈判
summary: Aumovio’s negotiations to secure memory chips for next year are proving difficult as artificial intelligence companies consume supplies of the key components. That's according to Jutta Doenges, chief financial officer of the German auto supplier, who spoke with Bloomberg Television anchor Anna Edwards at the Bloomberg New Voices event in Frankfurt on June 24. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japanese, South Korean Stocks Gain on Renewed Confidence in AI
title_cn: 日本、韩国股市因对人工智能重拾信心而上涨
summary: Japanese and South Korean equities climbed, led by gains in the tech sector after Micron Technology Inc.’s upbeat forecast reignited confidence in the artificial-intelligence trade and brought relief to the market.

title: Kioxia Plans New US Listing in Spring, Stock Split at Home
title_cn: 铠侠计划春季在美国上市，并在国内进行股票分拆
summary: Kioxia Holdings Corp. plans to offer US depositary shares in the spring of 2027 and a stock split to take advantage of runaway demand for exposure to AI-related semiconductor stocks.

title: Micron Shares Jump as Forecast Beats Estimates
title_cn: 预测好于预期，美光股价上涨
summary: Micron Technology Inc. surged in late trading after its quarterly sales forecast crushed Wall Street estimates, signaling that an AI-fueled growth run remains strong. The largest US maker of computer memory chips, said revenue will be approximately $50 billion in the fiscal fourth quarter, which runs through August. Bloomberg's Ruhell Amin breaks down the numbers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: H.B. Fuller Nears £628 Million Deal for UK Medtech AMS
title_cn: H.B. Fuller 接近以 6.28 亿英镑收购 UK Medtech AMS
summary: H.B. Fuller Co. is close to an agreement to acquire Advanced Medical Solutions Group Plc in a deal valuing the equity of the British maker of tissue-healing medical products at £628 million ($827 million).

title: Japan’s Regional Banks Sell More Senior Bonds as Rates Rise
title_cn: 随着利率上升，日本地区银行出售更多优先债券
summary: Japan’s regional banks are selling more senior bonds as the Bank of Japan’s latest interest-rate increase intensifies competition for deposits.

title: Alibaba Slides to 16-Month Low After Anthropic’s AI Accusations
title_cn: Anthropic 遭人工智能指控后阿里巴巴股价跌至 16 个月低点
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. shares slid to a 16-month low in Hong Kong after Anthropic PBC accused the Chinese technology giant of “illicitly” accessing its artificial intelligence model.

title: Stocks Rally as Micron Revives AI Trade
title_cn: 随着美光重振人工智能贸易，股市上涨
summary: Stocks in Asia climbed alongside US equity futures after Micron Technology Inc.’s blowout sales outlook reignited confidence in the artificial-intelligence trade. Bloomberg's Anthony Stephens has the context on how the AI sector is trending. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kenyan Police Block Roads Before Anniversary March
title_cn: 肯尼亚警方在周年纪念日游行前封锁道路
summary: Kenyan police blocked major roads into Nairobi and cordoned off parliament buildings before planned marches to mark two years since deadly anti-government demonstrations. More than 60 people died in the protests on June 25, 2024, many of them shot by police when they marched on parliament as lawmakers voted on unpopular tax measures introduced by President William Ruto’s administration. (Source: AP)

title: Trump Is Blowing Up the GOP’s Affordability Plans
title_cn: 特朗普正在摧毁共和党的负担能力计划
summary: A last-minute detour on the way to signing a housing bill spurs public grousing about the president’s focus

title: Europe Lauds Ukraine’s Newfound Strength as Aid Payouts Begin
title_cn: 随着援助支出的开始，欧洲赞扬乌克兰新发现的实力
summary: European Union officials hailed Ukraine’s progress in fighting off Russia’s invasion as the bloc began disbursing aid from its €90 billion ($102 billion) loan and held out the prospect for more investment in the war-torn country.

title: Conservatives Urge Overturn of Trump’s Biofuel Blending Quotas
title_cn: 保守派敦促推翻特朗普的生物燃料混合配额
summary: Nearly three dozen conservatives — including longtime allies of President Donald Trump — are pushing the House to overturn biofuel-blending quotas imposed by his administration, arguing they are stoking consumer costs before an election set to hinge on economic concerns.

title: Europe Defense Sector Has ‘Long Way to Go’, German Minister Says
title_cn: 德国部长表示欧洲国防部门“还有很长的路要走”
summary: Germany’s decision to scrap a €10 billion ($11.4 billion) warship purchase and the demise of a joint fighter-jet project with France show that Europe’s defense industry needs to catch up with the continent’s ambitions for a military buildup, a senior German defense official said.

title: Burnham Team Looks at Treasury Breakup and BOE Reforms
title_cn: 伯纳姆团队研究财政部拆分和英国央行改革
summary: Influential figures in Andy Burnham’s entourage have urged the would-be prime minister to break up the Treasury to refocus the government’s agenda on growth.

title: US Protests China Visa Rules by Snubbing APEC Meet in Macau
title_cn: 美国拒绝在澳门举行的亚太经合组织会议，抗议中国签证规定
summary: The US has decided against sending senior officials to an Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation meeting in Macau, blaming what it called China’s “discriminatory” visa rules on American diplomats.

title: Japan Unveils Multi-Year Framework as Part of Budget Reform
title_cn: 日本公布多年框架作为预算改革的一部分
summary: Japan will create a new multi-year framework to finance policies aimed at boosting its growth potential as part of Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s overhaul of the country’s budgeting process.

title: Burnham Would Make Better UK Premier Than Farage, Britons Say
title_cn: 英国人称伯纳姆将成为比法拉奇更好的英国首相
summary: Britons said Andy Burnham would make a better prime minister than Reform UK Leader Nigel Farage, according to a poll on Thursday that highlights how Labour’s likely new leader can provide the governing party with an electoral edge.

title: Macron Says French Navy Boards Shadow Fleet Tanker Off Sicily
title_cn: 马克龙称法国海军在西西里岛附近登上影子舰队油轮
summary: France’s navy boarded another oil tanker in the Mediterranean as Europe seeks to crack down on Russian shadow-fleet ships used to export sanctioned crude.

title: US Senate Votes Down Iran War Powers Resolution
title_cn: 美国参议院否决伊朗战争权力决议
summary: The US Senate rejected a resolution to end the war with Iran as two Republicans flipped their votes hours after President Donald Trump confronted GOP senators for backing an earlier resolution to end the conflict. Kate Ackley of Bloomberg Government has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine Says It Hit Rosneft Oil Refineries in Russia’s Ufa
title_cn: 乌克兰称其袭击了俄罗斯石油公司位于俄罗斯乌法的炼油厂
summary: Ukrainian drones hit two oil refineries in Russia’s Ufa, owned by the country’s top oil producer Rosneft PJSC, the latest in a spate of strikes on Russian energy infrastructure that have led to a fuel shortage.

title: ‘We’ve Fallen Behind’: Canada Races to Break Supply Chain Gridlock Choking Trade
title_cn: “我们已经落后了”：加拿大竞相打破阻碍贸易的供应链僵局
summary: In the eyes of Transport Minister Steven MacKinnon, the sheer size of Canada is both blessing and curse.

title: Australia Faces a Trumpian Turn in Politics
title_cn: 澳大利亚政治面临特朗普式转变
summary: Pauline Hanson’s far right One Nation is no longer an outsider on the political stage.

title: Rachel Reeves Suggests Burnham Will Remove Her as UK Chancellor
title_cn: 雷切尔·里夫斯建议伯纳姆解除她英国财政大臣的职务
summary: Rachel Reeves appeared to concede that Andy Burnham won’t keep her on as Chancellor of the Exchequer, while insisting she has a long and close relationship with the man expected to replace Keir Starmer as UK prime minister next month.

title: Taiwan Drill Simulates Maritime ‘Quarantine’ by Chinese Forces
title_cn: 台湾演习模拟中国军队海上“检疫”
summary: Taiwan has held tabletop military exercises to simulate its response to a potential maritime quarantine by China, National Security Council Deputy Secretary-General Lii Wen said at a briefing Thursday.

title: Germany's Defense Sector Has 'Long Way to Go': Minister
title_cn: 德国国防部长：德国国防部门还有“很长的路要走”
summary: Germany Deputy Defense Minister Nils Schmid says the decision to scrap a €10 billion ($11.4 billion) warship purchase and the demise of a joint fighter-jet project with France this month show that the country’s industry needs to catch up with ambitions for a military buildup. Schmid speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kerry Says Iran War 'Never Should Have Happened'
title_cn: 克里称伊朗战争“根本不应该发生”
summary: Former Secretary of State John Kerry discusses the conflict between the US and Iran and ongoing negotiations between Washington and Tehran to reach a deal. "It is going to be exceedingly difficult to get the Iranians to give up more than they had in a prior agreement," Kerry tells Bloomberg Television. He adds the Obama-era deal, the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA) was "the strongest" nuclear agreement in history. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Swedish Opposition Sees Bank Tax Helping Households Spend More
title_cn: 瑞典反对派认为银行税有助于家庭增加支出
summary: A tax that Sweden’s opposition Social Democrats want to levy on the country’s banks would lead to lower costs for households and help them regain some of the purchasing power they lost over recent years, according to the party’s economic spokesperson.

title: Zambia’s Inflation Rate Declines to Lowest Level in Eight Years
title_cn: 赞比亚通胀率降至八年来最低水平
summary: Zambia’s inflation rate fell in June to the lowest level since early 2018, as price growth softened slightly across the board.

title: Johannesburg Adds 700 Managers as City Struggles to Pay Bills
title_cn: 约翰内斯堡增加了 700 名经理，因为该市难以支付账单
summary: Johannesburg plans to add 1,000 managers and professionals to its workforce, according to budget documents, even as the city fails to pay bills for power and fuel supplies.

title: EU Gives US Trade Deal Final Approval Ahead of Trump Deadline
title_cn: 欧盟在特朗普最后期限前最终批准美国贸易协议
summary: The European Union’s US trade deal is set to go into effect after the bloc gave its final sign-off, banking that the pact will ensure some stability despite ongoing economic tensions.

title: Kenyan Police Block Roads Before Deadly Protest Anniversary
title_cn: 肯尼亚警方在致命抗议周年纪念日之前封锁道路
summary: Kenyan police blocked major roads into Nairobi and cordoned off parliament buildings before planned marches to mark two years since deadly anti-government demonstrations.

title: Foreign Policy Gap Leaves Burnham Exposed to Global Crises
title_cn: 外交政策差距使伯纳姆面临全球危机
summary: In his final weeks as Britain’s prime minister, Keir Starmer, has repeatedly warned how “dangerous and volatile” the world is becoming. Andy Burnham is on a collision course with it.

title: Micron Earnings Spark Global Tech Rebound | Daybreak Europe 6/25/2026
title_cn: 美光盈利引发全球科技股反弹黎明欧洲 6/25/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

Global stocks rebounded from a two-day slide as Micron’s blowout sales forecast reignited enthusiasm for the AI trade. The largest US maker of computer memory chips surged in late trading.

And NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte played to President Donald Trump’s love of praise and splashy visuals during a visit to Washington that was aimed at easing the US leader’s anger over alliance nations’ reluctance to help with the campaign against Iran.

Today's guests:  Modupe Adegbembo, Economist, Jefferies; Edwin Millar, Climate Economist, Bank of England & NGFS Climate Economist. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Swiss President Will Meet US’s Jamieson Greer Amid Tariff Spat
title_cn: 瑞士总统将在关税争端中会见美国总统杰米森·格里尔
summary: Swiss President Guy Parmelin will meet US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer later this month for talks as the two countries aim to finalize a broader trade deal amid renewed tariff pressure from Washington.
